program.name: Atlas Customer Portal Modernization
program.description: A fictional program used to develop and test TPM Copilot.

items.author: Maya Chen
items.title: API contract approved
items.content: The architecture group approved version 2 of the customer-profile API contract. The application and integration teams can begin implementation.

items.author: Daniel Ortiz
items.title: Security design review
items.content: The security design review is scheduled for July 14. Priya owns the presentation and expects a decision on the authentication approach during the review.

items.author: Jordan Lee
items.title: Test environment delivery delay
items.content: The infrastructure team expects the integration test environment to be delivered three business days late. This may delay end-to-end testing unless the team can use the shared development environment temporarily.
